_comment: Two non-blocking hooks. SessionStart: if spec-workflow.md exists but CLAUDE.md doesn't @import it (a half-install), show a visible systemMessage warning. Stop: remind to tick task checkboxes. Delete either entry, or the whole "hooks" block, to remove them. To make the workflow strict instead, see README.md.

hooks.command: sh -c 'f=.claude/spec-workflow.md; if [ -f "$f" ] && ! grep -q "@.claude/spec-workflow.md" CLAUDE.md 2>/dev/null; then printf "%s" "{\"systemMessage\": \"Spec kit half-installed: .claude/spec-workflow.md exists but CLAUDE.md does not @import it. The /spec-* commands still work, but the workflow guardrails and right-sizing guidance are inactive. Add this line to CLAUDE.md: @.claude/spec-workflow.md\", \"suppressOutput\": true}"; fi'
echo 'Spec reminder: if you implemented a task, mark it [x] in .claude/specs/<feature>/tasks.md before moving on.'
